observe.label: Observe the Boulder
observe.baseEvent: The Observer studies the Boulder without touching it.
observe.socialSignal: Attention gathers around the visible weight.

name.label: Name the Boulder
name.baseEvent: The Observer gives the Boulder a name.
name.socialSignal: The name gives the room a repeatable handle.

move.label: Move the Boulder
move.baseEvent: The Observer shifts the Boulder from its first position.
move.socialSignal: The path changes and everyone has to account for it.

ignore.label: Ignore the Boulder
ignore.baseEvent: The Observer leaves the Boulder unaddressed.
ignore.socialSignal: The object remains in the way without being given language.

named-weight-law.name: Named Weight Law
named-weight-law.description: Any named obstruction must be treated as part of the room's structure until publicly revised.

witness-law.name: Witness Law
witness-law.description: A watched change requires a second witness before the room accepts it as settled.
